welcome.title: Create your QR business card
welcome.subtitle: A modern app for creating
welcome.featureUniversalityDesc: Luggage tags, business cards, device stickers
welcome.featureCompatibilityDesc: Works with any device and scanner
welcome.featureSecurityDesc: Data is processed only on your device
welcome.featureSpeedDesc: Create a QR code in just a few seconds

versions.v21Subtitle: Simple compatible card for offline tags and legacy devices
versions.v30Subtitle: Recommended format for Android, iOS and email clients
versions.v40Subtitle: Social links, GPS and modern fields support

result.heading: 🎉 Your QR business card is ready!
result.description: You can now copy or download your QR code
result.qrTooltip: Click to copy the QR code as an image
result.qrHelper: Click the QR code to copy it as a framed image
result.saveQrHintMobile: 📱 Long-press the image above, then choose 'Save Image' or 'Copy'.
result.alertCopiedImage: QR code copied as image to clipboard!
result.alertCopiedText: QR code copied as text to clipboard (image not supported)
